titleStmt.title: SII 36.17: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 17. (A.R. No. 17 of 1910.) KOḶḶĒGĀL, KOLLEGAL TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT. On a third slab lying near the entrance to Lakshmī Nārāyaṇaśvāmī temple.

summary.p: Much damaged and surface peeled off at certain places. Inscription starts with the praśasti of merchant guild beginning with Samasta bhuvanāśraya. Records the creation of daṉmapaṭṭaṇam, by the members of mercantile guild represented by 18 countries of 1000 directions, by clubbing the ūr of Koḷḷagar and the twelve hamlets (paḷḷis) associated with it. They also made a grant for providing sacred food offerings and a perpetual lamp to be lighted in the temple of Maṇalīśvaramuḍaiya-Mahādēva at Koḷḷagar alias Tribhuvanamādēvi-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Padi-nāḍu. The cash dues for the pāvāḍai service by the village were exempted in favour of the temple for meeting the expenses of the above service. It was also stipulated that the village shall feed properly all those soldiers when they visit the village. One of the members signed below claimed that he killed one [Kava]piñji whose identity is not known.
Published in E.C. (n), Vol. IV, No. Kol. 2.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī samastabhuvaṉāśraya
pañcaśata vīrasāsaṉa lakṣaṇāla
ṅakrata vakṣastali bhuvaṉaparāgrama śrīvā
sudeva kaṇṭaḻi mūlabathrorbhava
śrī Aiyappoḻilppura paramē[ svari]
kku makkaḷāki nālu
ṭṭanamum
puramum patine
ṇ pūmi teśit ticaiyāyirattainū
ṟṟuvarum patineṇ pūmi pa
ṇaṉa makkaḷum Upaiya mā
Iruntu pati nāṭṭu koḷḷakarrā
na tirupuvaṉamātevic catup
petimaṅkalattu Ūrum Iv
vūrārk kuṭutta paṉṉiraṇṭu paḷḷiyum U
ḷpaṭṭār Ellām vaḷañciyarāy paṭi
kaikkumpaṟa ṉukkum Uriyarākavum
Ivvūrum paḷḷiyum taṉmapaṭ
ṭaṇam cetom ceyta paricāvatu
Ivvūr maṇalīśvaramuṭaiya mādeva
ṟku tiruvamutukkum tirunontāviḷak koṉ
ṟum nivantamāka Ūrom paṇṇiraṇṭu pa
ḷḷiyum paṇamum pāvāṭaiyum tavittu kuṭuttom
patineṇ pūmi Ūravarom kavapiñciyai kut
tina Irevaṉaccākkanār ticaiviḷaṅka U
yyak koṇṭāṉum Aññūṟṟuvāṉ A
yāṟaṉum vāraṇavāciyum rājarāja paḻavarici vīra
ṉum Etirāna ciṅkamum palapakaiyaṉu vikkiṟu
yavaṉum catumukaṇṭaṉum kavaṟaikaḷuy
yak koṇṭāṉum neṭumpuṟaiyūr Uyyakko
ṇṭāṉum Aṭikkīḻtaḷamāna vikkara mālapuram
kāḷi vīraciṅkamum palarayveṅkoḷ
vīraṉum palaiyākavirāyum malaimaṇ
ṭala muyyakkoṇṭāṉum maṟṟu

m patiṇeṉpūmi vīra
rom Ivvūrt taṉmapa
ṭṭaṇañ ceytu kuṭu
ttom Ivvūrkku va
nta vīrarai Ororuvaruk
ku mekkaṇṭu coṟu
koṭuppārānom I
tamma Aḻiccār vīrā
ṭṭaṇa Aiyappo
ḻilum vāraṇavā
ciyumaḻiccāṉ pati
neṇpūmi vaḷañci
yattaiyum patine
ṇ pūmi vīraraiyum A
ḻittāṉ virā[pi ] ce
ttāṉ Avaṉ cet
ttum nāy cetti
tum paṉṟi cetti
tum Okkum
Aṟamaṟavaṟkaṟama
llatu tuṇai
yillai
Digital edition of SII 36.17 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
